name: Space Electronic Travel Toy - Gigglescape™
description:
Indulge your kid in a fun memory game with this Light-up Memory Game Toy by Gigglescape™. This travel-friendly toy comes with a cute solar system design with volume-up and volume-down buttons plus a sliding button to choose among the three playing modes. They can follow the lights and push the button that lights up, remember the order of lights and try to press the buttons in the same order, or simply push buttons to light it up as they please. Suitable for ages two and up, this game encourages memory development and helps enhance fine motor skills.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
